subject: geography
teaching_goal: Be able to identify the primary pathways of pollutant transfer under economic globalization; learn to analyze pollutant‑transfer phenomena in specific case studies.
transcript: [646.472433 -> 705.78] 好我们可以看在经济全球化的背景下污染物主要从发达的工业股国家或地区向外发展中国家或地区转移这包括了污染物的直接输出以及伴随国际产业转移而发生的污染物间接输出那么同学们是否可以想到一个我们生活中的例子就是可能是离我们非常近的今年发生的一件事情日本的我提示一下对日本的核我们可以发现日本它排放核污水它不仅仅是对自己的沿海周边发生了产生的影响那么在洋流等一些自然泥土的作用下它会产生一些不可控的。

This structured visual summary helps consolidate the lesson's key points, with the teacher's gestures reinforcing the highlighted content.

edges.intent: Links economic globalization to pollutant transport.
Direct pollutant output origin from developed areas.
Indirect pollutant output affection on developing areas.
Industrial transfer contributes to indirect pollutant output.
Example of pollutant dispersion related to nuclear waste.
Ocean currents impact on nuclear waste dispersion.
Slide visually consolidates pollutant transport concepts.
Slide visually consolidates pollutant dispersion concepts.
